title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your ComfyUI Image Manager application settings

gallery.label: Enable Gallery
gallery.tooltip: Show gallery page in menu and navigation. When disabled, only masonry view will be used.

canvasCleanup.label: Auto cleanup Canvas folder on shutdown
canvasCleanup.tooltip: Automatically delete edited images in the Canvas folder when the server shuts down. When disabled, edited images are preserved.

deleteProtection.title: Delete File Protection
deleteProtection.description: Store deleted files in RecycleBin folder for recovery

enabled.label: Store deleted files in RecycleBin
enabled.description: When enabled, deleted files are backed up to RecycleBin folder instead of being permanently removed.

deleteProtection.info: RecycleBin folder is created in the project root. Deleted files are stored with timestamps. You can manually copy files from RecycleBin if recovery is needed.

metadata.title: Metadata Extraction Optimization

fast.label: Fast (Recommended)
fast.description: Quick signature scan - checks first 200 pixels then exits early

full.label: Full
full.description: Full file scan - checks all pixels (slow)

fileSize.label: Max File Size (MB)
fileSize.helper: Files larger than this will skip Stealth PNG scanning

resolution.label: Max Resolution (Megapixels)
resolution.helper: Images larger than this will skip Stealth PNG scanning

skipSettings.title: AI Tool Skip Settings
skipSettings.description: Automatically skip Stealth PNG scanning for specific AI tool images.

comfyui.label: Skip ComfyUI images (Recommended)
comfyui.description: ComfyUI doesn't use Stealth PNG, scanning unnecessary

webui.label: Skip WebUI images
webui.description: WebUI may use Stealth PNG, enable only if needed

secondary.label: Enable secondary extraction
secondary.description: Retry with Stealth PNG method if primary extraction fails.

metadata.performanceNote: 💡 Tip: Default settings (Fast + ComfyUI skip) provide optimal performance for most cases. ComfyUI image processing time reduced from 2682ms → 4ms!

thumbnail.title: Thumbnail Settings
thumbnail.description: Configure the size and quality used when generating thumbnails

regenerate.description: Regenerate thumbnails for all images with current settings

vit.label: ViT (Vision Transformer)
vit.description: Fast speed, high accuracy - recommended for general use

swinv2.label: SwinV2 (Swin Transformer V2)
swinv2.description: Moderate speed, very high accuracy - for cases requiring high accuracy

convnext.label: ConvNeXt
convnext.description: Fast speed, high accuracy - for cases requiring fast processing

auto.title: Auto
auto.description: Use GPU if available, otherwise CPU

general.label: General Tags Threshold: {{value}}
general.description: Lower values extract more tags (may increase noise)

character.label: Character Tags Threshold: {{value}}
character.description: Lower values detect more characters (may increase false positives)

pythonPath.label: Python Executable Path
pythonPath.helper: Path to Python executable (e.g., python, python3, C:\Python39\python.exe)

memoryManagement.title: Memory Management
memoryManagement.description: Configure how the model is unloaded from memory.
memoryManagement.autoUnloadDescription: Automatically unloads from memory after the configured time since last use.
memoryManagement.keepLoadedAlert: Model will be automatically unloaded from memory after the configured time.
memoryManagement.notKeepLoadedAlert: Model will remain in memory. It will stay loaded until manually unloaded or program shutdown.

test.title: Test
test.description: Test current settings with a specific image.

confirmDialog.resetMessage: Are you sure you want to reset ALL auto tags? This will clear active tags and queue images for background processing.

alerts.resetComplete: Reset complete. Queued for background processing.

dependencyWarning.title: Kaloscope Python dependency issue
dependencyWarning.hint: Run the command above in the current project environment, then refresh the status or retry the test.

rating.title: Rating Score Settings
rating.description: Configure the image rating score system

weights.title: Weight Configuration
weights.description: Configure scoring weights for each rating category.

preview.title: Live Preview (Example Rating: general=0.001, sensitive=0.045, questionable=0.735, explicit=0.470)

tiers.title: Tier Configuration
tiers.description: Configure rating tiers by score range.

table.name: Tier Name
table.empty: No tiers. Please add a tier.

dialog.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.

calculator.title: Score Calculator Test
calculator.description: Enter rating values to calculate the score.

recalculation.title: Recalculate Rating Scores
recalculation.description: Recalculate rating_score for all images based on current weight settings. All images with auto_tags will be processed.
recalculation.success: Recalculation complete: {{success}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed out of {{total}}

confirmDialog.title: Recalculate Rating Scores
confirmDialog.message: Recalculate rating_score for all images? This may take some time.

thumbnail.title: Thumbnail Settings
thumbnail.description: Configure size and quality used for thumbnail generation

regenerate.description: Regenerate all image thumbnails with current settings

background.title: Background Task Monitoring
background.loadFailed: Failed to load background task status
background.confirmReset: Reset background queue? All pending tasks will be cancelled.
background.confirmVerify: Verify {{count}} files?\nThis may take time if there are many files.
background.verifyIntervalError: Verification interval must be between 300-86400 seconds
background.verifySaveFailed: Failed to save file verification settings

verify.title: File Verification Status
verify.intervalTooltip: May cause time consumption and system load if there are many files

similarity.title: Image Similarity Search Settings
similarity.description: Automatically generate hashes for similar image search

systemStatus.title: System Status
systemStatus.description: Current status of the image similarity search system.
systemStatus.rebuildProgress: Hash generation in progress... {{processed}} completed/{{total}} total ({{percent}}% complete)

test.title: Test
test.description: Test current settings with a specific image.

validation.invalidHashFormat: Invalid hash format. Expected 48 hexadecimal characters.

duplicateScan.title: Full Duplicate Analysis
duplicateScan.description: Find duplicate image groups across the entire database.
duplicateScan.noResults: Run scan to display duplicate image groups.
duplicateScan.keepOneDelete: Keep first image and select rest for deletion
duplicateScan.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected images?

thresholds.title: Threshold Settings

similar.label: Similar threshold: {{value}}
similar.description: Lower is stricter, higher finds more similar images

thresholds.localStorageNote: Settings are saved locally and applied in real time during search.

forgotAccount.title: Forgot your account?
forgotAccount.description: If you forgot your password, you can recover your account using the following method.
forgotAccount.warning: ⚠️ Warning: Deleting this file will invalidate all sessions and require re-login.
forgotAccount.warningNote: Other data such as workflows and settings will not be affected.

setup.title: Setup Authentication
setup.description: Configure username and password to protect your image manager from unauthorized access. Once set, you will need to login to access the application.
setup.success: Authentication configured successfully! You will need to login on your next visit.

update.title: Change Credentials
update.description: Changing your credentials will require you to login again with the new credentials.

instructions.title: Thumbnail regeneration will proceed in the following order:
instructions.warningText: This may take a long time depending on the number of files.

folderSettings.title: Folder Management
folderSettings.subtitle: Configure watched folders and monitor background task status.

backgroundHash.title: Background Hash Monitoring Interval
backgroundHash.tooltip: Execution interval for background task (Phase 2) that generates hashes for uploaded files. Shorter intervals process faster but increase system load.
backgroundHash.intervalTooltip: Period to check for unprocessed hash tasks. Can be set between 5-300 seconds.

autoTagger.title: Auto-Tagging Scheduler
autoTagger.tooltip: Configure polling interval and batch size for auto-tagging scheduler. Shorter polling intervals and larger batch sizes process faster but increase system load.
autoTagger.pollingIntervalTooltip: Period to check for untagged images. Can be set between 5-300 seconds.
autoTagger.batchSizeTooltip: Number of images to process at once. Can be set between 1-100 images.
autoTagger.errorPollingRange: Polling interval must be between 5-300 seconds

messages.scanAllComplete: Full scan complete: {{totalFolders}} folders, {{totalNew}} new, {{totalExisting}} existing{{errors}}

dialog.folderNameHelper: If left blank, folder name will be used automatically
dialog.watcherTooltip: Real-time monitoring immediately detects file additions/modifications/deletions in the folder and processes them automatically. Works independently of auto-scan and provides faster response.
dialog.pollingIntervalTooltip: For network drives, file changes are detected using polling method. Shorter intervals detect faster but increase network load. Leave blank for auto-detection (default: 1000ms).
dialog.pollingIntervalHelper: Leave blank for automatic configuration. Recommended: 500-3000ms
dialog.excludeExtensionsTooltip: By default, all image formats (.jpg, .png, .webp, .gif, .bmp, .tiff) are scanned. Add extensions to exclude from scanning.
dialog.excludePatternsTooltip: Exclude specific folders or file patterns from scanning. Examples: node_modules, .git, temp

civitai.title: Civitai Integration
civitai.description: Automatically fetch model information from Civitai based on model hashes in image metadata.

settings.title: Settings
settings.enableDescription: When enabled, model information will be automatically fetched from Civitai for new images.
settings.apiIntervalDescription: Minimum time between API calls to avoid rate limiting. Recommended: 2 seconds.

rescan.title: Scan Existing Images
rescan.description: Scan existing images in your library to extract model references and add them to the Civitai lookup queue. This is useful for images that were imported before Civitai integration was enabled.
rescan.enableRequired: Enable Civitai integration to use this feature.

cachedModels.title: Cached Models ({{count}})
cachedModels.empty: No models cached yet. Models will be cached automatically when images with model hashes are added.

clearCache.title: Clear Model Cache
clearCache.message: Are you sure you want to clear all cached model information? This will remove all locally stored Civitai data. Models will be re-fetched when needed.

resetStats.title: Reset Statistics
resetStats.message: Are you sure you want to reset all statistics? This action cannot be undone.

upload.title: Upload to Civitai
upload.downloadTooltip: Download image and open Civitai. Upload the downloaded file manually
upload.intentTooltip: Use server URL to share. Requires server to be accessible from internet
upload.downloadDescription: Download image, then select the file on Civitai upload page
upload.intentDescription: Server provides image URL directly to Civitai (requires external access)
upload.downloadButtonTooltip: Download image and open Civitai upload page
upload.intentButtonTooltip: Generate intent URL and open Civitai
upload.includeMetadataDescription: Include AI generation info (prompt, model, etc.) in the post
upload.success: Intent URL created successfully. Click to open Civitai.

externalApi.title: External API Authentication
externalApi.description: Manage authentication credentials for external API services like Civitai.
externalApi.addProviderDescription: Add a new external API provider.
externalApi.providerNameHelper: Only letters, numbers, _, - allowed (e.g., openai, stability)
externalApi.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{provider}}?

llm.title: LLM Settings
llm.modelPlaceholder: Select or type a model name
llm.modelCustomHelper: You can select from the list or type a custom model name
llm.temperatureHelper: Higher = more creative, Lower = more consistent (0-2)
llm.localServerHelper: This is a local server. No API key required.

errors.nameRequired: Please enter both name and display name
